state_store.scope: The durable scheduler and run-coordination state use one SQLite WAL database. PostgreSQL is not an advertised state-engine store in v1.

first_party_plugins.inventory_rule: The list is the literal class-level plugin name inventory under src/elspeth/plugins at the assessed commit; a catalog revision is required when it changes.

transition.production_entry: A real scheduler caller reaches the exact transition.
transition.precondition_image: Every status, subtype, identity, owner, fence, and payload discriminator is asserted before the write.
transition.success_effects: The exact work row, event, outcome, loss, coordination, and emitted-work image is asserted.
transition.guard_refusal: Every wrong status, subtype, identity, owner, membership, epoch, and incomplete bundle is refused.
transition.zero_mutation_rollback: Refusal and injected component failure preserve or roll back every affected durable plane.
transition.concurrency: Independent connections or processes prove the winner, loser, generation, and ABA behavior.
transition.crash_restart: A fresh process converges at every boundary before and after the transition commit.
transition.boundary_composition: The real source, traversal, barrier, sink, follower, or repair caller preserves the transition contract.
transition.read_model_truth_table: Every downstream decision includes or excludes the transition's before/after subtypes correctly.
transition.maintenance: Exact executable selectors remain collected and the residual gap has coherent live ownership when actionable.

auxiliary.production_entry: A real scheduler or orchestration caller reaches the auxiliary mutation or loss decision.
auxiliary.precondition_image: Owner, membership, epoch, expiry, adoption, and durable identity inputs are exact.
auxiliary.success_effects: Expiry, adoption, membership, evidence, and identity changes are exact and no unrelated event is fabricated.
auxiliary.guard_refusal: Stale, foreign, inactive, ineligible, or already-adopted callers fail closed.
auxiliary.zero_mutation_rollback: Loss, refusal, or injected failure leaves every scheduler and coordination plane exact.
auxiliary.concurrency: Independent contenders demonstrate one effective authority and a bounded loser outcome.
auxiliary.crash_restart: Fresh-process recovery reconstructs the auxiliary state without duplicate authority or lost work.
auxiliary.boundary_composition: The production drain, intake, heartbeat, or recovery caller reacts correctly.
auxiliary.read_model_truth_table: Expiry, owner, membership, and adoption changes drive each consumer correctly.
auxiliary.maintenance: Exact selectors and any coherent actionable gap remain maintained.

run_coordination.production_entry: Leader, join, heartbeat, shutdown, or eviction orchestration reaches the exact coordination verb.
run_coordination.precondition_image: Run, worker, role, seat owner, epoch, heartbeat window, and membership state are exact.
run_coordination.success_effects: Seat, registry, epoch, heartbeat, and coordination-event images commit exactly.
run_coordination.guard_refusal: Duplicate, stale, live-seat, wrong-role, departed, evicted, or foreign-run callers fail closed.
run_coordination.zero_mutation_rollback: Refusal and component failure preserve seat, registry, and coordination-event planes.
run_coordination.concurrency: Independent processes prove one seat/admission/eviction winner and deterministic loser state.
run_coordination.crash_restart: Fresh processes safely resume or take over at registration, heartbeat, release, admission, departure, and eviction seams.
run_coordination.read_model_truth_table: Live-leader and dead-worker selectors reflect every seat/member/expiry arm.
run_coordination.maintenance: Exact coordination selectors and actionable residual ownership remain maintained.

production_boundary.production_entry: The real supported plugin or orchestration entry reaches the boundary.
production_boundary.precondition_image: Runtime composition, durable authority, input identity, lifecycle, and resource state are exact.
production_boundary.success_effects: Plugin-visible, scheduler, audit, outcome, artifact, and external-effect images are exact.
production_boundary.guard_refusal: Unsupported lifecycle, stale authority, bad result, or ambiguous external state fails closed.
production_boundary.zero_mutation_rollback: Raised, refused, or interrupted boundaries preserve or reconcile every durable and external plane.
production_boundary.concurrency: The supported deployment profile proves winner/loser/order behavior at the boundary.
production_boundary.crash_restart: Fresh-process execution converges at every listed cross-transaction seam.
production_boundary.boundary_composition: Every first-party plugin or lifecycle class named by the execution profile preserves the contract.
production_boundary.read_model_truth_table: Drain, flush, resume, follower, and teardown decisions observe every boundary-created state correctly.
production_boundary.maintenance: Representative production selectors and coherent actionable ownership remain maintained.

read_model.production_entry: The real orchestration decision calls the exact read model.
read_model.precondition_image: Every status, subtype, owner, run, expiry equality, duplicate, and ordering input is seeded.
read_model.success_effects: The returned set/count/decision and its downstream orchestration action are exact.
read_model.guard_refusal: Foreign run, malformed identity, stale snapshot, or invalid scope is rejected or excluded as contracted.
read_model.zero_mutation_rollback: The read and its consumer perform no uncontracted durable mutation on refusal or failure.
read_model.concurrency: Independent writers/readers prove snapshot and boundary behavior under supported storage semantics.
read_model.crash_restart: A fresh object/process against the same store returns the same decision for the same durable image.
read_model.boundary_composition: The real drain, resume, relinquish, eviction, flush, or completion consumer acts on the result correctly.
read_model.read_model_truth_table: Every positive and negative truth-table arm, exact boundary, deduplication, and order is asserted.
read_model.maintenance: The whole truth table and production consumer selectors remain maintained.

forbidden.production_entry: Every production surface that could attempt the forbidden path is exercised or bounded by explicit reachability evidence.
forbidden.precondition_image: The exact illegal state, subtype, owner, epoch, membership, or identity is constructed.
forbidden.success_effects: Success means the contracted refusal or deliberate absence is observed; no illegal transition succeeds.
forbidden.guard_refusal: The precise guard and error category reject the path before mutation.
forbidden.zero_mutation_rollback: Every durable and external before/after image is identical on refusal.
forbidden.concurrency: Contention cannot bypass the refusal or make the deliberately absent path reachable.
forbidden.crash_restart: Fresh-process state and recovery do not re-enable the forbidden path.
forbidden.boundary_composition: Real source, scheduler, barrier, coordination, plugin, or restore boundaries preserve the refusal.
forbidden.read_model_truth_table: No read decision fabricates or enables the forbidden state/path.
forbidden.maintenance: Refusal/reachability selectors and the deliberate-absence decision remain maintained.

hard_gates.title: Malformed state/subtype bundles are never admitted
Missing authority never selects a weaker production write
Contention cannot produce two effective winners
Refusal preserves the complete durable image
State and mandatory evidence commit or roll back together
Restart loses or duplicates neither work nor external effect
Orchestration decisions have no unproved state/subtype arm
Supported plugin lifecycle paths preserve the durable contract
Every mandatory catalog case is resolved
Source, architecture, catalog, assessment, and tracker agree

legs.title: Enqueue absent work as READY
legs.contract: Insert the complete resume cursor; exact replay is idempotent and incompatible replay refuses.

legs.title: Compose enqueue and initial READY claim
legs.contract: New-row enqueue and claim or exact existing-READY reconciliation commit atomically.

legs.title: Ingest row token source completion and initial lease
legs.contract: Row, token, exact step-0 source COMPLETED witness, work item, lease, events, and leader fence share one transaction.

legs.title: Claim READY work
legs.contract: One available READY row becomes LEASED with one effective owner and unchanged attempt identity.

legs.title: Claim complete PENDING_SINK work
legs.contract: Only a complete pending-sink bundle becomes a sink-redrive lease; the bundle remains exact.

legs.title: Recover expired transform lease
legs.contract: Eligible expired transform work returns READY with attempt bump and deterministic identity rotation.

legs.title: Recover expired sink-redrive lease
legs.contract: Eligible sink-redrive work returns PENDING_SINK without losing or changing its bundle identity.

legs.title: Mark claimed transform work BLOCKED
legs.contract: The exact transform lease becomes a legal barrier/queue hold with release evidence and no lease.

legs.title: Mark claimed transform work TERMINAL
legs.contract: The exact transform lease terminalizes, scrubs payload, and atomically records optional branch loss and event.

legs.title: Mark claimed transform work FAILED
legs.contract: The exact transform lease fails, scrubs payload, and atomically records optional branch loss and event.

legs.title: Park claimed transform work PENDING_SINK
legs.contract: The exact transform lease becomes attributed sink debt with a complete bundle and optional branch loss.

legs.title: Terminalize attributed pending-sink work
legs.contract: Durably outcomed attributed PENDING_SINK rows terminalize under strict ownership and authority.

legs.title: Terminalize claimed sink-redrive work
legs.contract: Durably outcomed sink-redrive leases terminalize under strict ownership and authority.

legs.title: Bulk terminalize sink debt
legs.contract: The complete requested token set validates before all rows and per-row events commit atomically.

legs.title: Repair pending sink from terminal outcome witness
legs.contract: Resume terminalizes only rows with durable terminal outcomes and never republishes the sink effect.

legs.title: Consume exact BLOCKED barrier snapshot
legs.contract: Exact blocked inputs, payload scrub, evidence, losses, and optional outputs share one fenced transaction.

legs.title: Convert BLOCKED passthrough to PENDING_SINK
legs.contract: Barrier consumption and passthrough sink bundle replacement are atomic.

legs.title: Emit new PENDING_SINK from barrier
legs.contract: Barrier consume and terminal-lane sink debt insertion are atomic with complete identity.

legs.title: Emit new READY continuation from barrier
legs.contract: Barrier consume and continuation insertion are atomic with complete cursor and references.

legs.title: Heartbeat active lease
legs.contract: The exact owner extends expiry without changing state identity attempt or scheduler events.

legs.title: Observe heartbeat lease loss
legs.contract: The loser records lease loss and abandons result/disposition with zero scheduler mutation.

legs.title: Adopt BLOCKED barrier item
legs.contract: Leader-fenced adoption and required membership/outcome evidence commit atomically.

legs.title: Reset holdless coalesce adoption
legs.contract: Only eligible adopted-but-holdless BLOCKED coalesce work resets for restore.

legs.title: Adopt branch-loss replay cursor
legs.contract: Leader-fenced branch-loss adoption is idempotent and does not fabricate scheduler events.

legs.title: Enforce worker membership
legs.contract: Registered claim enqueue and disposition paths refuse absent departed or evicted workers.

legs.title: Enforce leader epoch
legs.contract: Every strict leader-owned mutation verifies and extends the exact run leader and epoch first.

legs.title: Register initial run leader
legs.contract: Create epoch-1 leader seat, active leader membership, and coordination evidence atomically for a new run.

legs.title: Acquire or take over run leadership
legs.contract: Only an empty or expired seat admits one active worker, increments the epoch, and fences the prior leader.

legs.title: Heartbeat registered worker and leader seat
legs.contract: An active worker extends its membership window and, only when it owns the seat, the exact leader epoch window.

legs.title: Release run leader seat and membership
legs.contract: Only the exact run leader and epoch atomically clear the seat and move that run-scoped active membership to DEPARTED; a stale foreign or losing release mutates neither plane.

legs.title: Admit follower worker
legs.contract: A live leader seat admits one active claim-only follower with exact run membership and evidence.

legs.title: Depart registered worker
legs.contract: Only an active member becomes departed with one durable timestamp and cannot regain authority by heartbeat.

legs.title: Evict dead non-leader worker
legs.contract: The current leader and repository predicate fence eviction to an eligible expired non-leader in the same run and record the exact terminal membership image.

legs.title: Source ingress
legs.contract: Accepted rows enter TS-02 with source completion; before plugin execution resume repairs only an exact pre-fix missing-witness image and fails closed on ambiguity, while pre-row failures and quarantine exclusions create no scheduler work.

legs.title: Transform execution
legs.contract: Real transform outcomes and audit evidence compose with the correct scheduler disposition.

legs.title: Declarative gate execution
legs.contract: Real gate outcomes and route/loss evidence compose with the correct scheduler disposition.

legs.title: Aggregation barrier
legs.contract: Adoption plugin execution consume and continuation recover without loss duplicate or orphaned authority.

legs.title: Coalesce barrier
legs.contract: Durable merge decision parent finalization and barrier continuation converge across replay.

legs.title: Sink effect publication
legs.contract: Every production sink effect reserves claims preparation plans leases reconciles or commits and finalizes exactly once by contract.

legs.title: Post-sink restart and scheduler repair
legs.contract: Every sink interruption seam converges and TS-14 repairs scheduler debt without republication.

legs.title: Follower worker
legs.contract: A real follower builds starts traverses dispositions and tears down without assuming leader authority.

legs.title: Plugin lifecycle
legs.contract: Fresh resume follower partial-start normal and exceptional teardown honor supported lifecycle ordering.

legs.title: Unresolved producer work
legs.contract: Counts exactly READY BLOCKED and transform leases while excluding sink debt and final states.

legs.title: Unquiesced barrier-producing work
legs.contract: Counts exactly work that can still create a new barrier arrival.

legs.title: Active run backstop
legs.contract: Counts every non-final scheduler state and excludes TERMINAL and FAILED.

legs.title: Peer-owned work
legs.contract: Distinguishes other-owner active leases and attributed pending-sink work from self ownerless and other states.

legs.title: Continuation relinquishment
legs.contract: Relinquishes only when pending IDs have no READY or FAILED work and a peer owns continuation authority.

legs.title: Active peer lease resume guard
legs.contract: Includes only other-owner leases with expiry strictly after now and preserves deterministic ordering.

legs.title: Occupied run-leader seat snapshot
legs.contract: Returns every occupied seat with exact owner epoch expiry and derived seat_live; missing or vacant seats return none and expiry equal to now is live.

legs.title: Dead non-leader workers
legs.contract: Returns exactly active non-leader members in the run whose heartbeat expiry is strictly before now minus the requested grace interval with deterministic ordering.

legs.title: Active source-row scheduler identities
legs.contract: Returns the exact row identities with non-final scheduler work that drive mixed scheduler/source resume refusal.

legs.title: Blocked barrier token identities
legs.contract: Returns the exact distinct token identities represented by barrier-backed BLOCKED work so buffered tokens are excluded from redrive.

legs.title: Blocked barrier work count
legs.contract: Counts exactly barrier-backed BLOCKED work for completion and resume-preflight decisions without including queue-only or non-blocked rows.

legs.title: Blocked barrier work listing
legs.contract: Lists the complete deterministic barrier-backed BLOCKED work image needed to restore the barrier journal.

legs.title: Pending barrier-adoption listing
legs.contract: Lists exactly barrier-backed BLOCKED work still pending durable intake or adoption for the leader coordination loop.

legs.title: READY cannot jump to TERMINAL
legs.contract: Disposition requires an exact transform lease.

legs.title: Final states are final
legs.contract: No production verb accepts TERMINAL or FAILED as a transition source.

legs.title: Foreign barrier cannot release BLOCKED work
legs.contract: Barrier identity is part of every consume predicate.

legs.title: Wrong owner cannot disposition a lease
legs.contract: Exact owner and active membership fences refuse the caller with zero mutation.

legs.title: BLOCKED requires a release key
legs.contract: A claimed disposition cannot create an unreleaseable hold.

legs.title: Inactive registered worker cannot claim
legs.contract: Absent departed and evicted registered workers are refused.

legs.title: Ineligible lease cannot be recovered
legs.contract: Own live fresh or not-yet-expired work is excluded from strict recovery.

legs.title: Partial sink batch cannot terminalize
legs.contract: Bulk close validates unique complete owner-matched membership before mutation.

legs.title: Non-exhaustive barrier completion is refused
legs.contract: Duplicates overlap missing foreign uncovered or incomplete output identity fail closed.

legs.title: Stale leader cannot mutate strict state
legs.contract: Required leader-fenced verbs refuse the stale identity or epoch before payload writes.

legs.title: Source boundary failure cannot enter queue
legs.contract: Boundary failure records audit evidence and deliberately creates no scheduler row.

legs.title: WAITING state remains deleted
legs.contract: No state vocabulary writer reader or release path reintroduces WAITING.

legs.title: General queue-only hold release is absent
legs.contract: Reachability and refusal prevent dormant queue-only holds from becoming stranded production work.
